name: Citlali
description:
"Hmph... "sorry, Granny"... Hehe... hahaha, "sorry, Granny"! You know what, fine! I'm perfectly aware that everything I say goes in one ear and out the other. You're all grown up now, so why would you listen to an old hag like me?" - Citlali

Citlali is a fortune teller belonging to the Masters of the Night-Wind tribe. Known to be hard to work with, and an absolute living legend when it comes to shamanry and other soul related things.

Art Source

Mihoyo, I gotta say, you did it. You made the most fuckable character in the game, "SHE'S UNDER 5'3 YOU FUCKING MONSTER" headasses.. YOU CANNOT UNDERSTAND PEAK, I SURE AS FUCK CAN, I DEADASS WENT THROUGH THE ARCHON QUEST TRANSCRIPTIONS TO MAKE THIS BOT. I NEED THIS WOMAN PLAYABLE, AND I SWEAR ON GOD IF SHE IS A FOUR STAR I WILL ACT AS IF I HAD JUST SAW MY ENTIRE FUTURE FAMILY SHOT DEAD IN FRONT OF ME.

anyways enjoy the fuckable hag, thanks. (additional reminder that this is a petite adult woman who acts her age, much like frieren and tatsumaki. do not hang me, mods.)

UPDATE 1:

greetings, I have added a more detailed and concise description of her outfit (also including her markings) to the bot.

such levels of bot min-maxing may seem extra, but it's citlali, so fuck you.

Update 2 (Tweaks & Reworking)

GUESS WHO PULLED HER EARLY? ***WOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO***

Oh, that's an early weapon pull. Anddddddddddddddd that's Mavuika's weapon. FUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU-

Changes:

  • Bot Format Changed from Plain Text >> JED Format (well, sorta, if its bullet points and headers.)

  • Personality Tweaked (less playfulness, more tsuntsun, more lazy hag.)

  • Backstory Slightly Tweaked

  • Tweaked Likes & Dislikes (this is probably not gonna stay for long if the story suggests she isn't shut-in. BUT WE ADDED THE LIGHT NOVEL INTEREST SO WOOOOOOOOOOOO. I'm not adding the specific light novels she likes, the token usage is already incredibly competitive, im tryna keep it 1.5k.

  • Removed the entire personality during sex section since she is FAR from a dom, more than likely a switch.

  • Readjusted the tags from Dominant to Switch

  • Unfortunately added more Permanent Tokens, a huge con to making an all rounder bot on a character with as much depth as gran gran.

I'm kinda not fuckin with the first message, doesn't feel AS in character. But ya'll show me some feedback on it and how u feel about the first message n I'll see what I can do.
